opportunities.specific_product: Solar-powered post cap and step light multi-pack
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dark, tripping-hazard deck to glowing outdoor oasis for under $25
opportunities.before_state: Dim, unlit deck stairs and railing posts that guests stumble on after dark
opportunities.after_state: Warm-lit steps and posts glowing every night with zero wiring required
opportunities.why_now: BHG's publisher pins are actively pushing solar deck/stair lighting roundups with direct Amazon links and sub-$20 price anchors right as peak summer outdoor-entertaining season hits.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Worn, pet-hair couch into a like-new sofa for $45
opportunities.before_state: Faded, stained couch covered in pet hair, claw marks, and shedding
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, tailored slipcover that looks brand-new and wipes clean in seconds
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's summer house-tour content is driving living-room refresh searches, and the waterproof/pet-hair angle solves a year-round pain point while sitting on Golden Home's highest commission tier (24-30%).

opportunities.transformation_hook: Boring hollow-core door into a $65 statement barn door
opportunities.before_state: Plain flat hollow door or awkward swinging door eating up floor space
opportunities.after_state: Rustic-chic sliding barn door installed as a bold statement wall feature
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's publisher feed is actively spotlighting barn door styling right now, signaling the aesthetic is resurfacing into mainstream renovation searches.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia countertop utensil crock and tool set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Cluttered counter into an organized kitchen station for $28
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered counter with tangled utensils and mismatched tools crowding the sink area
opportunities.after_state: Streamlined counter with a matching utensil crock and tools within easy reach
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy and RealSimple pins are both reexamining kitchen setup rules and countertop styling this week, and Syruvia's 20% commission makes tool-organizer content especially profitable.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper cervical pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Fix neck pain with one $50 pillow swap, nothing else changed
opportunities.before_state: Flat, lumpy pillow causing a stiff neck and restless side-sleeping
opportunities.after_state: Contoured cervical pillow with visibly better neck alignment and a styled nightstand setup
opportunities.why_now: Bedroom refresh content is trending on HGTV's Pinterest feed (kids' rooms, nursery redos), and neck-pain pillow searches carry consistently high buyer intent against Eli & Elm's 20% commission.
